heading: Ready to change a future?
sub: Every gift goes straight to a child's education, with 69% direct to the scholarship program. Receipts available on request.

qris.caption: Open any bank or e-wallet app, scan, and pay.
qris.apps: GoPay · OVO · DANA · ShopeePay · BCA · CIMB — all QRIS apps
qris.note: Goes to the same foundation account as bank transfer.

notes: Transfers go to Ragam Kemanusiaan Indonesia, the foundation behind our scholarship program. Send us your transfer confirmation for a receipt.
Donating from abroad? SWIFT transfers are supported.

signoff: Thank you for being part of Community Assist 2026.
